testsuite.name: BullsCowsTest
testsuite.system-out: ?[1;31m Start test 1?[0m Please, enter the secret code's length: > 1 Okay, let's start the game! Turn 1: > 0 Grade: None. Turn 2: > 1 Grade: None. Turn 3: > 2 Grade: None. Turn 4: > 3 Grade: None. Turn 5: > 4 Grade: None. Turn 6: > 5 Grade: None. Turn 7: > 6 Grade: None. Turn 8: > 7 Grade: 1 bulls. Congratulations! You guessed the secret code. ?[1;31m Start test 2?[0m Please, enter the secret code's length: > 4 Okay, let's start the game! Turn 1: > 0000 Grade: 1 bull(s). Turn 2: > 1111 Grade: None. Turn 3: > 2222 Grade: None. Turn 4: > 3333 Grade: 1 bull(s). Turn 5: > 4444 Grade: None. Turn 6: > 5555 Grade: 1 bull(s). Turn 7: > 6666 Grade: None. Turn 8: > 7777 Grade: 1 bull(s). Turn 9: > 0357 Grade: 1 bull(s) 3 cow(s). Turn 10: > 3057 Grade: 2 bull(s) 2 cow(s). Turn 11: > 5037 Grade: 4 bulls. Congratulations! You guessed the secret code. ?[1;31m Start test 3?[0m Please, enter the secret code's length: > 6 Okay, let's start the game! Turn 1: > 000000 Grade: None. Turn 2: > 111111 Grade: 1 bull(s). Turn 3: > 222222 Grade: 1 bull(s). Turn 4: > 333333 Grade: 1 bull(s). Turn 5: > 444444 Grade: None. Turn 6: > 555555 Grade: 1 bull(s). Turn 7: > 666666 Grade: 1 bull(s). Turn 8: > 777777 Grade: None. Turn 9: > 888888 Grade: None. Turn 10: > 999999 Grade: 1 bull(s). Turn 11: > 123569 Grade: 6 cow(s). Turn 12: > 213569 Grade: 1 bull(s) 5 cow(s). Turn 13: > 312569 Grade: 6 cow(s). Turn 14: > 132569 Grade: 6 cow(s). Turn 15: > 231569 Grade: 1 bull(s) 5 cow(s). Turn 16: > 321569 Grade: 6 cow(s). Turn 17: > 521369 Grade: 6 cow(s). Turn 18: > 251369 Grade: 2 bull(s) 4 cow(s).
